{{#setmainimage:StS2 Map-RestSite.png|quiet}}
{{Sequel Disambiguation|2}}
{{Hatnote|See {{2|Map Locations}} for all possible rooms.}}

Rest Sites are a standard {{2|Map Locations|Map Location}}, appearing multiple times per {{2|Acts|Act}}. The last room before each boss in Acts 1, 2, and 3 is always a rest site.

The player must choose one of the available options to prepare for higher floors before proceeding. If one of the standard options is unavailable for some reason, it will be greyed out.

== Standard Options ==
* '''Rest''': Heal for 30% of max HP (rounded down).
** Still available at full health.
* '''Smith''': {{2|Upgrade}} a card.
** Greyed out if all cards are already upgraded.

=== Relic Modifiers ===
* {{R|Dream Catcher||2}} adds a card reward screen after Resting (affected by any card reward relics the player possesses).
* {{R|Regal Pillow||2}} causes Resting to heal for an additional 15 HP.
* {{R|Stone Humidifier||2}} causes Resting to increase your Max HP by 5.
* {{R|Tiny Mailbox||2}} causes Resting to generate a random {{2|Potions|Potion}}.

== Special Options ==
Some {{2|Relics}} and circumstances enable more options at the Rest Site.

* {{R|Girya||2}}: Allows you to "'''Lift'''" to gain 1 {{KW|Strength||2}} (up to three uses).
* {{R|Shovel||2}}: Allows you to "'''Dig'''" to acquire a random {{2|Relic}}.
* {{R|Meat Cleaver||2}}: Allows you to "'''Cook'''" which removes 2 Cards and gives 9 Max HP. Greyed out if your Deck has less than 2 removable Cards in it.
* Having at least one card with {{KW|Clone||2}} in your deck allows you to "'''Clone'''" ''every'' Card with that {{2|Enchantments|Enchantment}} in your Deck. See also {{R|Pael's Growth||2}}.
* Having a {{C|Byrdonis Egg||2}} in your Deck allows you to "'''Hatch'''" the egg in exchange for {{R|Byrdpip||2}}, adding 1 copy of {{C|Byrd Swoop||2}} into the Deck.
* In {{2|Multiplayer}} you can choose to "'''Mend'''" another player, healing them for 30% of their Max HP.

== Other Interactions ==

* {{R|Miniature Tent||2}} allows for choosing any number of options at a Rest Site instead of being limited to just one.
* {{R|Eternal Feather||2}} restores 3 health for every five cards in your deck on entering the rest site automatically, without requiring an action.
* After leaving the rest site, {{R|Venerable Tea Set||2}} will give two additional {{KW|Energy||2}} on the first turn of the next combat.
** Similarly, {{R|Venerable Tea Set???||2}} obtained from the {{E|Merchant???|2}} event will give one additional {{KW|Energy||2}} on the first turn of the next combat. These two relics stack.

== Update History ==
* '''Early Access v0.103.2'''
**Ascension 6 changes from BETA branch were moved to the main version of the game. Rest Sites are now unaffected by Ascension levels.
*'''Early Access v0.102.0 (BETA)'''
**Ascension 6's name and effect were changed from 'Gloom - "Less rest sites."' to 'Inflation - "Removing cards from your deck at the Merchant is more expensive."'
